message:
bd-ml2r.11.1: add FNX diagnostics edge case unit tests

Add 21 new unit tests for FNX diagnostics module:

Edge cases:
- single_node_graph_no_diagnostics
- small_cycle_not_reported_as_dense (3-node)
- four_node_cycle_not_reported_as_dense (threshold boundary)
- multiple_disconnected_components_all_reported
- self_loop_handled_gracefully

Recommendation factory tests:
- recommendation_for_disconnected_component variants
- recommendation_for_articulation_point_has_example
- recommendation_for_bridge_edge_low_confidence
- recommendation_for_dense_cycle confidence levels

Type coverage:
- recommendation_category_display_names
- recommendation_confidence_score_ordering
- severity_ordering and as_str methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
